rationale: The citing paper mentions Bodapati (2008) only in the literature review as one example of prior recommendation work using purchase (revealed preference) data and a two-stage awareness-satisfaction structure. It is also referenced in a footnote as an example of studies using firm-initiated response data. The cited paper is not used as a direct methodological basis for the proposed virtual expert model, is not central to the model development equations, and is not a focal benchmark in the empirical comparisons.
